transcript: Speaker A (Girl): Hello. [Hello.] Speaker B (Boy): Hello. Are... how are... how are... are, sorry. [Hello. Uh... how are... how are... oh, sorry.] Speaker A (Girl): नाही नाही, चालतं. मला पण इंग्लिश-मराठी मिक्स होतं सगळं. असं बोल, "How are you?" [No, no, it's fine. I also mix English and Marathi. Say it like this, "How are you?"] Speaker B (Boy): How are you? Thank you, नेहा. पण तुमची इंग्लिश तर चांगली असेल ना? [How are you? Thank you, Neha. But your English must be good, right?] Speaker A (Girl): नाही, मी पण इथेच बेसिक शिकलीय. आत्ता ॲडव्हान्स लेव्हलला चाललीय. [No, I also learned the basics here. Now I'm at the advanced level.] Speaker B (Boy): असं का? मग कशी सुधारली तुमची इंग्लिश? [Is that so? Then how did your English improve?] Speaker A (Girl): असंच की. लोकांची इथे MySivi ॲपवर इंग्लिशमध्ये गप्पा मारते आणि होते इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस. [Just like this. I chat with people in English on the MySivi app, and that's how I practice.] Speaker C (Voiceover): MySivi ॲपवर एक कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त एक रुपयात. [Over 10 million people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi AI Speak English [MySivi AI Speak English] Start English Learning - MySivi [Start English Learning - MySivi] 10M+ Downloads [10M+ Downloads] Sivi is now MySivi [Sivi is now MySivi] MySivi Premium [MySivi Premium] LIMITED TIME OFFER [LIMITED TIME OFFER] ₹1 [₹1] Autopay, cancel anytime. [Autopay, cancel anytime.] 1,200 learners purchased today [1,200 learners purchased today] 24/7 AI English Teacher [24/7 AI English Teacher] 500+ Exercises and Lessons [500+ Exercises and Lessons] Unlimited Access [Unlimited Access]
summary: A young man struggles to speak English on a call, and a woman recommends practicing on the MySivi app. The ad highlights its 10M+ user base and promotes a 1-rupee trial offer.
